description_long: This is a modern, rectangular shelving unit with a geometric, asymmetrical design. The structure features three main horizontal shelves, each divided into compartments of varying sizes, some of which are closed off with colored panels in muted blue and mustard yellow. The exterior and most surfaces are finished in a matte gray, while the colored panels add a playful, contemporary accent. The back of the unit is solid and unadorned, while the sides reveal the open compartments and the depth of the shelves. The unit stands on small, sturdy feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, rectangular shelving unit with gray, blue, and mustard yellow panels, featuring open and closed compartments in an asymmetrical layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing three shelves with a mix of open spaces and colored panels in blue and mustard yellow.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the staggered arrangement of compartments.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain, solid gray surface with no visible compartments or panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open compartments and colored panels from a different angle.
